title: A Day of Culture at Zeugma & the Fortress
description: Spend a themed day in Gaziantep: Zeugma Mosaic Museum, Gaziantep Castle, Historic Tea House.
notes: Catch a glimpse with Çingene Kızı.
Take in the view of the city from around the castle.
Enjoy menengiç coffee at the foot of the castle.
Free public restrooms near the city center.
